title: BEM-845 execute 844 route
objective:
Run script:
"""
sep='\n'
for d in ['scripts','.github/workflows','governance/state','governance/reports','governance/tasks/pending','governance/handoff','governance/transport']:
    Path(d).mkdir(parents=True,exist_ok=True)
created='2026-05-24 | 01:08 (UTC+3)'
def load(p):
    p=Path(p)
    try: return json.loads(p.read_text(errors='ignore')) if p.exists() else {}
    except Exception as exc: return {'_load_error':str(exc)}
route=load('governance/state/bem844_route_after_bem843_response_check.json')
rs=route.get('status','unknown')
if rs=='next_process_real_claude_response':
    status='real_response_processing_selected'
    next_action='parse real Claude response and create agreed protocol'
else:
    # Add a post-claude guard script that writes explicit failure if no real response file appears.
    guard=Path('scripts/ensure_claude_response_or_failure.py')
    guard.write_text('''#!/usr/bin/env python3\nimport json\nfrom datetime import datetime, timedelta, timezone\nfrom pathlib import Path\nSEP="\\n"\nKYIV=timezone(timedelta(hours=3))\nOUT=Path("governance/audit_mailbox/claude_to_gpt")\nSTATE=Path("governance/state/claude_response_guard_state.json")\nnow=datetime.now(KYIV).strftime("%Y-%m-%d | %H:%M (UTC+3)")\nOUT.mkdir(parents=True,exist_ok=True)\nreal=[]\nfor p in sorted(OUT.glob("*")):\n    if p.is_file():\n        txt=p.read_text(encoding="utf-8", errors="ignore")\n        up=txt.upper(); low=(p.name+" "+txt).lower()\n        bad="NOT CLAUDE APPROVAL" in up or "RUNTIME BLOCKER" in up or "not treat this as claude" in low\n        ok="DECISION:" in up and ("APPROVED" in up or "CHANGE_REQUIRED" in up or "BLOCKED" in up) and ("CLAUDE RESPONSE" in up or "Claude Internal Auditor" in txt)\n        if ok and not bad:\n            real.append(str(p))\nif real:\n    status="real_response_present"\nelse:\n    status="real_response_missing_after_claude_step"\n    fail=OUT/("bem845_claude_response_missing_failure.md")\n    fail.write_text("# BEM-845 | CLAUDE RESPONSE MISSING | NOT CLAUDE APPROVAL"+SEP+SEP+"Дата: "+now+SEP+"Decision: BLOCKED"+SEP+"Reason: Claude dispatcher ran or was dispatched, but no real Claude response file was detected."+SEP+"Required fix: inspect Claude action/provider outcome and prompt/output path."+SEP,encoding="utf-8")\nSTATE.parent.mkdir(parents=True,exist_ok=True)\nSTATE.write_text(json.dumps({"schema_version":"claude_response_guard_state.v1","status":status,"real_responses":real,"checked_at":now},indent=2,ensure_ascii=False)+SEP,encoding="utf-8")\nprint(json.dumps({"status":status,"real_responses":real},ensure_ascii=False))\n''')
    wf=Path('.github/workflows/claude-internal-auditor-dispatcher.yml')
    text=wf.read_text(errors='ignore') if wf.exists() else ''
    insert='''\n      - name: Ensure Claude response or explicit failure\n        if: always()\n        run: python3 scripts/ensure_claude_response_or_failure.py\n'''
    if wf.exists() and 'ensure_claude_response_or_failure.py' not in text:
        marker='      - name: Commit dispatcher state'
        if marker in text:
            text=text.replace(marker,insert+marker,1)
        else:
            text=text+insert
        wf.write_text(text)
    status='dispatcher_response_guard_installed'
    next_action='queue Claude dispatcher retry, tick, then inspect guard state and real response'
state={'bem':'BEM-845','status':status,'route_status':rs,'next_action':next_action,'created_at':created}
Path('governance/state/bem845_execute_bem844_route.json').write_text(json.dumps(state,indent=2,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
Path('governance/reports/bem845_execute_bem844_route.md').write_text('# BEM-845 | Execute BEM-844 Route | '+status+sep+sep+json.dumps(state,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
Path('governance/tasks/pending/bem845_next.md').write_text('Next: '+next_action+sep+'Operator relay forbidden. Report does not stop development.'+sep)
Path('governance/handoff/GPT_NEXT_ACTION.md').write_text('# GPT NEXT ACTION | BEM-845'+sep+sep+'Status: '+status+sep+'Next: '+next_action+sep)
with Path('governance/transport/results.jsonl').open('a',encoding='utf-8') as h: h.write(json.dumps(state,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
changed=['governance/state/bem845_execute_bem844_route.json','governance/reports/bem845_execute_bem844_route.md','governance/tasks/pending/bem845_next.md','governance/handoff/GPT_NEXT_ACTION.md','governance/transport/results.jsonl']
if status=='dispatcher_response_guard_installed': changed.extend(['scripts/ensure_claude_response_or_failure.py','.github/workflows/claude-internal-auditor-dispatcher.yml'])
changed_files.extend(changed)
ops_applied.append('Executed BEM-844 route by installing a dispatcher response guard when no real Claude response was found')
"""
No issue comments.
